2604.08256.title: HyperMem: Hypergraph Memory for Long-Term Conversations
2604.08256.paper_summary: Long-term memory is essential for conversational agents to maintain coherence, track persistent tasks, and provide personalized interactions across extended dialogues. However, existing approaches as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and graph-based memory mostly rely on pairwise relations, which can hardly capture high-order associations, i.e., joint dependencies among multiple elements, causing fragmented retrieval. To this end, we propose HyperMem, a hypergraph-based hierarchical memory architecture that explicitly models such associations using hyperedges. Particularly, HyperMem structures memory into three levels: topics, episodes, and facts, and groups related episodes and their facts via hyperedges, unifying scattered content into coherent units. Leveraging this structure, we design a hybrid lexical-semantic index and a coarse-to-fine retrieval strategy, supporting accurate and efficient retrieval of high-order associations. Experiments on the LoCoMo benchmark show that HyperMem achieves state-of-the-art performance with 92.73% LLM-as-a-judge accuracy, demonstrating the effectiveness of HyperMem for long-term conversations.
2604.08256.paper_summary_zh: 長期記憶對於對話代理來說是必不可少的，它能夠維持一致性、跟踪持久任務，並在延長的對話中提供個性化的互動。<lb/>然而，現有的方法如檢索增強生成（RAG）和基於圖的記憶主要依賴於成對關係，這很難捕捉高階關聯，即多個元素之間的聯合依賴，導致檢索碎片化。<lb/>為此，我們提出了HyperMem，一種基於超圖的層次記憶架構，明確地使用超邊來建模這些關聯。<lb/>特別地，HyperMem將記憶結構化為三個層次：主題、情節和事實，並通過超邊將相關的情節及其事實分組，將分散的內容統一為一致的單位。<lb/>利用這一結構，我們設計了一種混合詞彙語義索引和粗到細的檢索策略，支持高階關聯的準確和高效檢索。<lb/>在LoCoMo基準上的實驗顯示，HyperMem達到了92.73%的LLM作為評判者的準確率，展示了HyperMem在長期對話中的有效性。
2604.08256.author: Juwei Yue et.al.
2604.08256.authors: Juwei Yue, Chuanrui Hu, Jiawei Sheng, Zuyi Zhou, Wenyuan Zhang, Tingwen Liu, Li Guo, Yafeng Deng
